content: I will view lines 130 to 160 of `lib/screens/tool_detail_screen.dart` to inspect the exact lines of `_getUserLocation` so we can replace them safely and robustly. This will add a timeout and fallback to prevent ANRs on emulators!
thinking:
**Analyzing the ANR**

I've pinpointed the cause of the "namaz_app isn't responding" (ANR) error. It seems `Geolocator.getCurrentPosition(desiredAccuracy: LocationAccuracy.high)` is hanging indefinitely in the emulator because GNSS isn't locking. It's essentially blocking and not timing out, causing the application to become unresponsive.
